untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detecting direction changes in a 16-day moving average trendline using swing analysis (3-month swing period with 1-quarter calculation ratio). This requires custom trendline fitting or swing high/low detection logic not available in the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators provide price levels and standard MAs, but not trendline direction detection or swing analysis.
translation_notes: Attempted to use sma_20 as closest approximation to 16-day MA (sma_20 is nearest allowed period). However, the core requirement of detecting 'trendline direction changes' cannot be accurately expressed with simple crossing operators on a single MA. The signal requires derivative/slope analysis or swing point identification which is outside the scope of the allowed indicators. A proper implementation would need a custom 'trendline_direction' or 'swing_high/low' indicator.
